title: astragalus alyssoides
intro: Astragalus alyssoides, also known as Lesser Milk-vetch, is a flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus alyssoides include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Astragalus alyssoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
